name: bomRollup
invariants: output.ok === false || ('message' in output.result) || (Array.isArray(output.result.rows) && typeof output.result.rollup === 'object')
output.ok === false || !('rows' in output.result) || output.result.rows.every(r => Number.isFinite(r.extendedCost) && r.supplierLinks && typeof r.supplierLinks.mcmaster === 'string')
_note: BOM cost rollup (BomPanel.tsx). materialCost = Σ(qty × buildQty × unitCost); overhead = materialCost × overheadRate; totalCost = materialCost + overhead; costPerUnit = totalCost / buildQty. Each row carries supplierLinks {mcmaster,digikey,grainger}. criticalPath = top-3 longest leadTimeDays. finiteOr()/intOr() coerce poisoned NaN/Infinity unitCost/qty/buildQty to finite; r2() returns 0 on overflow so no Infinity price is rendered. Reads from artifact.data. Pure compute, no STATE, deterministic.
